_comment: Canonical structured form of the Cold Front IPA proposal. This is the contract the downstream Build swarm should consume — rendered_sample is the human-readable view, every other field is the machine view. See EXPECTED-OUTPUT.md for the same content rendered as markdown plus the rule-by-rule traceback.

engagement.summary: Full Q3 creative engagement for the Cold Front IPA launch (drop date August 5): brand identity for the new SKU, a 5-week multi-channel launch campaign, and a half-day local photo/video shoot. Identity work compressed to a July 1 sub-deadline to meet the July 7 can-print date.

line_items.description: label + can art + tap handle, fits existing Aurora/Glacier system

multipliers_applied.basis: delivered by July 1, inside standard 21-day window

line_items.description: concept + 4 video edits + 12 static social + 2 billboard layouts + in-store collateral
1 location, 1 talent, 30 retouched stills, 4 short-form video edits

discounts_skipped.reason: Northstar at 1 prior job (Aurora); discount begins at 3 jobs
Single-SKU launch (Cold Front only); rule is about SKU count, not deliverable count

pass_through._comment: Always billed at cost, never marked up. See pricing_rules.json -> media.

payment_terms.deposit_reason: rush deposit rate triggered by ID-001 carrying a rush multiplier

optional_add_ons.note: Not included in totals above. Surfaced separately at the client's request. Ad spend billed through at cost, never marked up.

approval_gates.reason: total agency fees fall in $25K–$60K band
the proposal is the artifact the client signs

rule_provenance._comment: Every total/sub-total above is reachable from these rules + the line-item inputs alone. See EXPECTED-OUTPUT.md for the per-number traceback.
rules_not_fired: discounts.repeat_client (Northstar at 1 prior job; threshold is 3)

rendered_sample: See EXPECTED-OUTPUT.md for the proposal as it would render to the client (markdown). This JSON is the contract the downstream Build swarm reads; the markdown is the human-facing form.
